fields.title: task config: add sandbox + approval fields
fields.description:
## Task

Extend task type config to support sandbox + approval policy overrides, loaded from `~/.pi/agent/settings.json` and the nearest project `.pi/settings.json` (same precedence rules as today).

## Files

- `extensions/tau/src/task/types.ts`
- `extensions/tau/src/task/registry.ts`

## Changes

- Extend `TaskType` and `ResolvedPolicy` to include optional sandbox/approval config (inherit by default).
- Parse/normalize sandbox fields from `settings.json` under `tasks.<name>.sandbox`.
- Ensure merging rules match current task type merge behavior.

## DoD

- Task types can specify sandbox overrides in settings.json.
- Missing fields inherit from parent runtime config.
- Invalid values are rejected with a clear error from TaskRegistry.load().
fields.close_reason: Implemented worker sandbox/approval inheritance, clamping, per-call resnapshot, approval broker routing, and vitest coverage
